sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and modernize the framework stack.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime against the target JDK.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile and run against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or meet the migration requirement.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID required by modern Spring Boot and JDBC drivers.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer dependency management; 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ requirements.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security configuration.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed in later versions; using it causes compilation errors or runtime warnings depending on the exact version, but primarily it is a breaking API change in Spring Boot 3 migration.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL syntax.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Spring Security 6 enforces the use of lambda DSL for configuration; the old fluent API without lambdas is no longer supported or is deprecated in a way that breaks compilation in Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Add migration comment hint for WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter removal.
Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 environments; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.
